query: WITH orphan AS ( SELECT anchor.request_id, anchor.request_started_at FROM usage_request_anchors anchor WHERE anchor.request_started_at < $1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM usage_facts fact WHERE fact.request_id = anchor.request_id AND fact.request_started_at = anchor.request_started_at ) FOR UPDATE OF anchor SKIP LOCKED ) DELETE FROM usage_request_anchors anchor USING orphan WHERE anchor.request_id = orphan.request_id AND anchor.request_started_at = orphan.request_started_at
